creator: jjachuf@gmail.com
text:
fails when trying to compile the port:

# make
===>  License LGPL3 accepted by the user
===>  Found saved configuration for tevent-0.9.17
===>   tevent-0.9.18 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - found
===> Fetching all distfiles required by tevent-0.9.18 for building
===>  Extracting for tevent-0.9.18
=> SHA256 Checksum OK for tevent-0.9.18.tar.gz.
===>  Patching for tevent-0.9.18
===>  Applying FreeBSD patches for tevent-0.9.18
1 out of 1 hunks failed--saving rejects to tevent_signal.c.rej
=> Patch patch-tevent_signal.c failed to apply cleanly.
=> Patch(es) patch-buildtools__wafsamba__samba_install.py patch-lib__replace__system__wait.h applied cleanly.
*** [do-patch] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/tevent.
*** [build] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/tevent.

0.9.17 version compiled without problems

Fix: 

0.9.17 version compiled without problems
How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/devel/tevent/
# make
